scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm.cmd run dev --prefix backend" "npm.cmd run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:alt: concurrently -n backend-dev,frontend-dev -c yellow,cyan "set PORT=3336&& set FRONTEND_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3004,http://127.0.0.1:3004,http://192.168.18.75:3004&& npm.cmd run dev --prefix backend" "set VITE_API_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:3336&& npm.cmd run dev:alt --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm.cmd start --prefix backend" "npm.cmd run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm.cmd install --prefix backend && npm.cmd install --prefix frontend
